problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: The key to Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? is Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial — specifically Photonic bandgap manipulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
